ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'poler_v6'
Toolkit не может найти poler_v6.py. Решения:
Убедитесь, что poler_v6.py лежит рядом с poler_toolkit/ (в архиве v2.1 он уже там)
Или: export POLER_TOOLKIT_POLER_V6=/path/to/poler_v6.py
Permission denied: /home/...
HOME read-only. Toolkit автоматически fallback на /tmp/pol_toolkit_output/ .
Или укажите явно: export POLER_TOOLKIT_OUTPUT=/tmp/my_output
No chapters found; treating whole text as one chapter
Toolkit не нашёл заголовки глав. Укажите язык:
python -m poler_toolkit structure FILE --lang ua       # украинский
python -m poler_toolkit structure FILE --lang en       # английский
python -m poler_toolkit structure FILE --lang inline_ru  # для "ГЛАВА 1" inline
Only N paragraphs after filtering
Слишком короткий текст или EPUB без переносов строк. Для EPUB попробуйте:
python -m poler_toolkit structure FILE.epub --lang inline_ru
HTTP API: Connection refused
Сервер не запустился. Проверьте:
Порт не занят: lsof -i :8000
Запустите с verbose: python -m poler_toolkit serve --port 8000 -v
poler-toolkit command not found (после pip install)
Либо pip install . не завершился успешно, либо ~/.local/bin не в $PATH :
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
# или запустите напрямую:
python -m poler_toolkit <recipe>
paths.py
Файл: poler_toolkit/paths.py · Размер: 8 459 байт
""" poler_toolkit.paths — централизованная конфигурация путей. Никаких hardcoded абсолютных путей в коде. Все пути резолвятся через: 1. Env vars (POLER_TOOLKIT_OUTPUT, POLER_TOOLKIT_CACHE, XDG_*) 2. Platform defaults (~/.poler_toolkit/, ~/.cache/poler_toolkit/) 3. Fallback на /tmp/pol_toolkit/ Это позволяет toolkit'у работать: - В любой песочнице/контейнере (cwd не важен) - В Google Colab (/content/) - В Linux desktop (~/.local/share/) - В Docker (через env vars) - В любом другом окружении Env vars (в порядке приоритета): POLER_TOOLKIT_OUTPUT  — корень для выходных файлов (PNG, JSON, verdict) POLER_TOOLKIT_CACHE   — корень для persistent кеша (smart_cache recipe) POLER_TOOLKIT_HOME    — корень для всего toolkit (если задан, override XDG) XDG_CACHE_HOME        — стандартный XDG cache (если POLER_TOOLKIT_CACHE не задан) XDG_DATA_HOME         — стандартный XDG data (если POLER_TOOLKIT_OUTPUT не задан) TMPDIR                — для fallback (/tmp) """ from __future__ import annotations import os import tempfile from pathlib import Path def get_output_root () -> Path : """ Корень для выходных файлов (PNG, JSON, verdict.md). Директория создаётся автоматически при первом обращении. Priority: 1. $POLER_TOOLKIT_OUTPUT 2. $XDG_DATA_HOME/poler_toolkit 3. $HOME/.local/share/poler_toolkit 4. $HOME/pol_toolkit_output  (если HOME доступен) 5. /tmp/pol_toolkit_output   (fallback) """ # 1. Explicit env var env = os . environ . get ( "POLER_TOOLKIT_OUTPUT" ) if env : p = Path ( env ) . expanduser () else : # 2. POLER_TOOLKIT_HOME (master override) home = os . environ . get ( "POLER_TOOLKIT_HOME" ) if home : p = Path ( home ) . expanduser () / "output" else : # 3. XDG_DATA_HOME xdg_data = os . environ . get ( "XDG_DATA_HOME" ) if xdg_data : p = Path ( xdg_data ) . expanduser () / "poler_toolkit" else : # 4. ~/.local/share/poler_toolkit user_home = os . path . expanduser ( "~" ) if user_home and user_home != "~" : p = Path ( user_home ) / ".local" / "share" / "poler_toolkit" else : # 5. /tmp fallback p = Path ( tempfile . gettempdir ()) / "pol_toolkit_output" try : p . mkdir ( parents = True , exist_ok = True ) except OSError : # Если HOME read-only или нет прав — fallback на tmp p = Path ( tempfile . gettempdir ()) / "pol_toolkit_output" p . mkdir ( parents = True , exist_ok = True ) return p def get_cache_root () -> Path : """ Корень для persistent кеша (smart_cache recipe). Директория создаётся автоматически. Priority: 1. $POLER_TOOLKIT_CACHE 2. $XDG_CACHE_HOME/poler_toolkit 3. $HOME/.cache/poler_toolkit 4. /tmp/pol_toolkit_cache """ env = os . environ . get ( "POLER_TOOLKIT_CACHE" ) if env : p = Path ( env ) . expanduser () else : home = os . environ . get ( "POLER_TOOLKIT_HOME" ) if home : p = Path ( home ) . expanduser () / "cache" else : xdg_cache = os . environ . get ( "XDG_CACHE_HOME" ) if xdg_cache : p = Path ( xdg_cache ) . expanduser () / "poler_toolkit" else : user_home = os . path . expanduser ( "~" ) if user_home and user_home != "~" : p = Path ( user_home ) / ".cache" / "poler_toolkit" else : p = Path ( tempfile . gettempdir ()) / "pol_toolkit_cache" try : p . mkdir ( parents = True , exist_ok = True ) except OSError : p = Path ( tempfile . gettempdir ()) / "pol_toolkit_cache" p . mkdir ( parents = True , exist_ok = True ) return p def get_test_file () -> Path | None : """ Путь к тестовому файлу для smoke-тестов и __main__ блоков. Priority: 1. $POLER_TOOLKIT_TEST_FILE (если задан и существует) 2. ./upload/Касіопея*.txt (относительно cwd) 3. ./tests/fixtures/sample.txt 4. None (тест пропустится) """ env = os . environ . get ( "POLER_TOOLKIT_TEST_FILE" ) if env and Path ( env ) . exists (): return Path ( env ) # Fallback: common test fixtures (relative paths, не hardcoded absolute) candidates = [ "upload/Касіопея исп канон главы 1 -58 (1).txt" , "tests/fixtures/sample.txt" , "sample.txt" , ] for c in candidates : if Path ( c ) . exists (): return Path ( c ) return None def get_test_plugin () -> Path | None : """ Путь к тестовому плагину для custom_plugin smoke-теста. Priority: 1. $POLER_TOOLKIT_TEST_PLUGIN 2. ./tmp/test_plugin.py 3. ./tests/fixtures/test_plugin.py 4. None """ env = os . environ . get ( "POLER_TOOLKIT_TEST_PLUGIN" ) if env and Path ( env ) . exists (): return Path ( env ) for c in [ "tmp/test_plugin.py" , "tests/fixtures/test_plugin.py" , "test_plugin.py" ]: if Path ( c ) . exists (): return Path ( c ) return None def get_test_dir () -> Path : """ Каталог для batch_directory smoke-теста. Priority: 1. $POLER_TOOLKIT_TEST_DIR 2. /tmp/test_batch/ (создаётся при необходимости) """ env = os . environ . get ( "POLER_TOOLKIT_TEST_DIR" ) if env : p = Path ( env ) p . mkdir ( parents = True , exist_ok = True ) return p p = Path ( tempfile . gettempdir ()) / "test_batch" p . mkdir ( parents = True , exist_ok = True ) return p def get_poler_v6_path () -> Path | None : """ Путь к poler_v6.py (если он не на sys.path автоматически). Priority: 1. $POLER_TOOLKIT_POLER_V6 (explicit) 2. Same directory as this package (../poler_v6.py) 3. Parent of this package (../../poler_v6.py) 4. None — пусть Python ищет сам """ env = os . environ . get ( "POLER_TOOLKIT_POLER_V6" ) if env and Path ( env ) . exists (): return Path ( env ) here = Path ( __file__ ) . resolve () . parent candidates = [ here / "poler_v6.py" , # bundled here . parent / "poler_v6.py" , # sibling here . parent . parent / "poler_v6.py" , # parent of package dir ] for c in candidates : if c . exists (): return c return None def ensure_poler_v6_on_path () -> bool : """ Гарантирует что poler_v6.py доступен для импорта. Возвращает True если модуль загружен. """ try : import poler_v6 # noqa: F401 return True except ImportError : pass p = get_poler_v6_path () if p is None : return False import sys parent = str ( p . parent ) if parent not in sys . path : sys . path . insert ( 0 , parent ) try : import poler_v6 # noqa: F401 return True except ImportError : return False # ============================================================ # Convenience constants (вычисляются лениво через функции выше) # Используйте функции в runtime, эти — только для совместимости # ============================================================ DEFAULT_OUTPUT_ROOT = get_output_root () DEFAULT_CACHE_ROOT = get_cache_root () def refresh_defaults (): """Пересчитать DEFAULT_* (если env vars изменились в runtime).""" global DEFAULT_OUTPUT_ROOT , DEFAULT_CACHE_ROOT DEFAULT_OUTPUT_ROOT = get_output_root () DEFAULT_CACHE_ROOT = get_cache_root () __all__ = [ "get_output_root" , "get_cache_root" , "get_test_file" , "get_test_plugin" , "get_test_dir" , "get_poler_v6_path" , "ensure_poler_v6_on_path" , "refresh_defaults" , "DEFAULT_OUTPUT_ROOT" , "DEFAULT_CACHE_ROOT" , ]
README.md
Файл: poler_toolkit/README.md · Размер: 14 088 байт
poler_toolkit v2.1
Универсальный инструмент анализа текстов на базе POLER v6 .
14 рецептов, CLI, HTTP API, 92 теста, env-aware пути.
Трёхслойная архитектура
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ACCESS LAYER  (poler_toolkit/serve/, cli.py, runner.py)    │
│  CLI + HTTP API + 14 endpoints + OpenAPI 3.0.3              │
│  ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────    │
│  → python -m poler_toolkit analyze FILE                     │
│  → POST /analyze                                            │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                            ↑
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ANALYSIS LAYER  (poler_toolkit/recipes.py, recipes_ext/)   │
│  14 рецептов: analyze, compare, structure, characters,      │
│  theme_evolution, themes_alpha, diff_versions,              │
│  batch_directory, custom_plugin,                            │
│  smart_read, smart_search, smart_batch, smart_cache,        │
│  smart_diff                                                 │
│  ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────    │
│  → sklearn TF-IDF + KMeans + PCA                            │
│  → matplotlib viz (10 типов графиков)                       │
│  → JSON + Markdown verdicts                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                            ↑
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  INFRA LAYER  (poler_toolkit/core.py, paths.py, viz.py,     │
│  report.py, errors.py)                                      │
│  Env-aware paths, чтение файлов, нормализация, графики,     │
│  отчёты, исключения                                         │
│  ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────    │
│  → paths.get_output_root() → $POLER_TOOLKIT_OUTPUT          │
│  → core.split_chapters(text, lang="auto")                   │
│  → viz.chapter_matrix(sim, titles, out_path)                │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                            ↑
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ENGINE  (poler_v6.py — 3077 строк, 90 функций)             │
│  Базовый движок: analyze_large_file, grep_search_file,      │
│  cluster_fragments, build_search_index, read_epub,          │
│  diff_files, analyze_directory, EMOTIONAL_MARKERS (60),     │
│  THEMES (5), PolerAnalyzer class                            │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
4 слоя, не дублируют друг друга — надстраиваются:
ENGINE ( poler_v6.py ) — низкоуровневые операции с текстом. Без него toolkit не работает.
INFRA ( core.py , paths.py , viz.py , report.py , errors.py ) — общие утилиты: чтение, нормализация, графики, отчёты, env-aware paths.
ANALYSIS ( recipes.py , recipes_ext/ ) — 14 прикладных рецептов, комбинирующих POLER + sklearn + matplotlib.
ACCESS ( cli.py , runner.py , serve/ ) — CLI и HTTP API для запуска рецептов.
Требования к окружению
Python ≥ 3.9 (тестировалось на 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12)
numpy >= 1.20 , scipy >= 1.7 , scikit-learn >= 1.0 , matplotlib >= 3.4
Для тестов: pytest >= 7.0 , pytest-cov >= 4.0
Переменные окружения
| Переменная | Назначение | Default |
|---|---|---|
| POLER_TOOLKIT_OUTPUT | Корень для выходов (PNG, JSON, verdict.md) | ~/.local/share/poler_toolkit/ |
| POLER_TOOLKIT_CACHE | Persistent кеш (smart_cache recipe) | ~/.cache/poler_toolkit/ |
| POLER_TOOLKIT_HOME | Master override (output + cache) | — |
| POLER_TOOLKIT_POLER_V6 | Явный путь к poler_v6.py | автопоиск |
| POLER_TOOLKIT_TEST_FILE | Тестовый файл для __main__ блоков | — |
| POLER_TOOLKIT_TEST_PLUGIN | Плагин для custom_plugin test | — |
| POLER_TOOLKIT_TEST_DIR | Каталог для batch_directory test | /tmp/test_batch/ |
| XDG_DATA_HOME , XDG_CACHE_HOME | Стандартные XDG | — |
Никаких hardcoded абсолютных путей в коде.
14 рецептов
Stage 1 — базовые (4)
| Рецепт | Назначение |
|---|---|
| analyze | Глубокий анализ одного файла (POLER + sklearn) |
| compare | Сравнение двух файлов по метрикам |
| structure | Только структурный анализ (быстро, без POLER engine) |
| characters | Карта персонажей (POLER grep + co-occurrence) |
Stage 2 — расширенные (5)
| Рецепт | Назначение |
|---|---|
| theme_evolution | Эволюция 60 EMOTIONAL_MARKERS по главам |
| themes_alpha | Алфавитный инвертированный индекс слов с source tracking |
| diff_versions | Сравнение двух версий одного текста (POLER diff_files + TF-IDF) |
| batch_directory | Анализ всех файлов в каталоге (PCA + outlier detection) |
| custom_plugin | Запуск внешнего Python-плагина (sandbox-lite) |
Stage 2 — smart (5, от MiMo Code)
| Рецепт | Назначение |
|---|---|
| smart_read | Token-efficient чтение (summary/context/streaming) |
| smart_search | Унифицированный поиск (regex + full-text + discovery) |
| smart_batch | Компактная batch-статистика |
| smart_cache | Persistent JSON-кеш (store/get/list/clear) |
| smart_diff | Быстрый diff: 2 файла или файл vs кеш |
Установка
Вариант A — pip install (рекомендуется)
cd poler_final_build/
pip install .
# или в режиме разработки:
pip install -e .[test]
После этого доступна команда:
poler-toolkit list
poler-toolkit analyze /path/to/file.txt --keyword "X"
Вариант B — распаковка архива
tar -xzf poler_toolkit_final_<TIMESTAMP>.tar.gz
cd poler_final_build/
python3 -m poler_toolkit list
См. INSTALL.md для подробностей.
Запуск
CLI
# Список рецептов
python -m poler_toolkit list
# Анализ одного файла
python -m poler_toolkit analyze novel.txt --keyword "Міка"
# Сравнение двух файлов
python -m poler_toolkit compare v1.txt v2.txt
# Структурный анализ (быстро)
python -m poler_toolkit structure novel.txt
# Карта персонажей (авто-detect)
python -m poler_toolkit characters novel.txt
# Эмоциональная эволюция по главам
python -m poler_toolkit theme_evolution novel.txt
# Алфавитный индекс слов
python -m poler_toolkit themes_alpha novel.txt
# Сравнение версий
python -m poler_toolkit diff_versions v1.txt v2.txt
# Анализ каталога
python -m poler_toolkit batch_directory /path/to/dir/
# Запуск пользовательского плагина
python -m poler_toolkit custom_plugin --plugin-path my_plugin.py file.txt
# Token-efficient чтение
python -m poler_toolkit smart_read novel.txt --mode summary
# HTTP API сервер
python -m poler_toolkit serve --port 8000
HTTP API
python -m poler_toolkit serve --port 8000
14 endpoints: GET / , GET /health , GET /openapi.json , GET /recipes ,
POST /analyze (+ 13 других рецептов), GET /tasks/{task_id} .
Запрос:
{"filepaths": ["/path/to/file.txt"], "options": {"keyword": "Міка"}}
Ответ (async):
{"status": "ok", "task_id": "abc123", "output_dir": "...", "report": {...}, "verdict": "..."}
Python API
from poler_toolkit import runner
# Запуск любого из 14 рецептов
out_dir = runner.run("analyze", ["file.txt"], keyword="Міка", lang="auto")
print(f"Результаты в: {out_dir}")
Выходной формат
Каждый запуск создаёт директорию <output_root>/<label>_<YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS>/ :
analyze_<timestamp>/
├── 01_chapter_matrix_sklearn.png
├── 02_chapter_matrix_poler.png
├── 03_transition_smoothness.png
├── 04_pca_scatter.png
├── 05_entropy.png
├── 06_cluster_sizes.png
├── 07_character_map.png
├── report.json     ← машинно-читаемый
└── verdict.md      ← человекочитаемый
Тестирование
# Unit-тесты (83)
python -m pytest poler_toolkit/tests/test_*.py -q
# Integration-тесты (9 end-to-end CLI)
python -m poler_toolkit.tests.integration_test
# Все тесты + coverage
python -m pytest poler_toolkit/tests/ --cov=poler_toolkit --cov-report=term-missing
# HTML coverage report
python -m pytest poler_toolkit/tests/ --cov=poler_toolkit --cov-report=html:coverage_report
Текущее покрытие: 33% total (core modules 85-100%).
Структура проекта
poler_final_build/
├── poler_v6.py                 ← ENGINE (3077 строк)
├── pyproject.toml              ← pip install метаданные
├── requirements.txt            ← зависимости
├── MANIFEST.in                 ← что включать в архив
├── README.md                   ← этот файл
├── INSTALL.md                  ← инструкция по установке
├── CHANGELOG.md                ← история изменений
└── poler_toolkit/              ← INFRA + ANALYSIS + ACCESS
    ├── __init__.py
    ├── __main__.py             ← entry: python -m poler_toolkit
    ├── cli.py                  ← CLI (11 подкоманд)
    ├── runner.py               ← оркестратор
    ├── core.py                 ← чтение, главы, нормализация
    ├── paths.py                ← env-aware пути (get_output_root, get_test_file, ...)
    ├── viz.py                  ← 10 типов графиков
    ├── report.py               ← JSON + Markdown отчёты
    ├── errors.py               ← 8 классов исключений
    ├── recipes.py              ← 9 рецептов (Stage 1 + Stage 2 imports)
    ├── recipes_ext/            ← Stage 2 deep + smart recipes
    │   ├── theme_evolution.py
    │   ├── themes_alpha.py
    │   ├── diff_versions.py
    │   ├── batch_directory.py
    │   ├── custom_plugin.py
    │   └── smart_toolkit.py    ← от MiMo Code (5 smart рецептов)
    ├── serve/                  ← HTTP API
    │   ├── server.py
    │   ├── openapi_spec.py
    │   ├── task_store.py
    │   └── __init__.py
    ├── tests/                  ← 83 unit + 9 integration = 92 теста
    │   ├── test_paths.py
    │   ├── test_core.py
    │   ├── test_errors.py
    │   ├── test_report.py
    │   ├── test_recipes.py
    │   └── integration_test.py
    └── docs/
        ├── AI_USAGE.md         ← для AI-агентов (1743+ строк)
        └── EXAMPLES.md         ← 10 примеров (1128+ строк)
Авторы
| Компонент | Автор |
|---|---|
| poler_v6.py (engine, 3077 строк) | Пользователь |
| poler_toolkit/ Stage 1 + Stage 2 deep recipes (7) | GLM (8 параллельных агентов) |
| poler_toolkit/recipes_ext/smart_toolkit.py (5 smart recipes) | MiMo Code |
| poler_toolkit/serve/ (HTTP API) | GLM (Agent F) |
| poler_toolkit/docs/ (2871+ строк) | GLM (Agent G) |
| poler_toolkit/paths.py + test coverage | GLM (финальная итерация) |
Версия
2.1 — финальная версия. См. CHANGELOG.md .
recipes.py
Файл: poler_toolkit/recipes.py · Размер: 36 467 байт
""" poler_toolkit.recipes — встроенные рецепты анализа. Каждый рецепт — это функция: recipe_<name>(filepaths, **opts) -> ReportBundle ReportBundle = { "report": Dict[str, Any],    # для JSON "verdict_lines": List[str],  # для Markdown "artifacts": Dict[str, Path] # PNG-файлы } Рецепты: - analyze     — глубокий анализ одного файла (POLER + sklearn) - compare     — сравнение двух файлов по метрикам - structure   — только структурный анализ (главы, кластеры, PCA) - characters  — карта персонажей по тексту """ from __future__ import annotations import re import math import logging from pathlib import Path from typing import Any , Dict , List , Optional , Tuple from collections import Counter import numpy as np from scipy.sparse import hstack import scipy.sparse as sp from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import TfidfVectorizer from sklearn.metrics.pairwise import cosine_similarity from sklearn.cluster import KMeans from sklearn.decomposition import PCA from sklearn.metrics import silhouette_score from . import viz from . import core from . import report from .errors import RecipeError , ConfigurationError # Extension recipes (Stage 2) — built by Agents A-E. # Each module exposes a single public function recipe_<name>(...) that # returns the standard {report, verdict_lines, artifacts} bundle. from .recipes_ext.theme_evolution import recipe_theme_evolution from .recipes_ext.themes_alpha import recipe_themes_alpha from .recipes_ext.diff_versions import recipe_diff_versions from .recipes_ext.batch_directory import recipe_batch_directory from .recipes_ext.custom_plugin import recipe_custom_plugin from .recipes_ext.smart_toolkit import ( recipe_smart_read , recipe_smart_search , recipe_smart_batch , recipe_smart_cache , recipe_smart_diff , ) log = logging . getLogger ( "poler_toolkit.recipes" ) # ============================================================ # Общие утилиты # ============================================================ def _l2norm_sparse ( X ): norms = sp . linalg . norm ( X , axis = 1 ) norms [ norms == 0 ] = 1.0 return X . multiply ( 1.0 / norms [:, None ]) def _shannon_entropy ( text : str ) -> float : tokens = re . findall ( r "[\w’']+" , text . lower ()) if not tokens : return 0.0 counts = Counter ( tokens ) total = len ( tokens ) return - sum (( c / total ) * math . log2 ( c / total ) for c in counts . values ()) def _sklearn_features ( paragraphs : List [ str ]) -> Tuple [ Any , Any ]: """Строит TF-IDF матрицу (word + char n-grams).""" if len ( paragraphs ) < 4 : raise RecipeError ( "too few paragraphs for sklearn analysis" , hint = "Нужно минимум 4 абзаца. Возможно, текст не разбит на абзацы." , ) word_vec = TfidfVectorizer ( max_features = 5000 , ngram_range = ( 1 , 2 ), min_df = 2 , sublinear_tf = True , token_pattern = r "(?u)\b[\w’']+\b" , ) char_vec = TfidfVectorizer ( analyzer = "char_wb" , ngram_range = ( 3 , 5 ), max_features = 5000 , min_df = 2 , sublinear_tf = True , ) Xw = word_vec . fit_transform ( paragraphs ) Xc = char_vec . fit_transform ( paragraphs ) X = hstack ([ Xw , Xc ]) . tocsr () X = _l2norm_sparse ( X ) . tocsr () return X , ( word_vec , char_vec ) def _best_kmeans ( X , k_range : range ) -> Tuple [ int , float , Dict [ int , float ], KMeans ]: """Подбирает K по silhouette.""" best_k , best_sil = None , - 1 sils = {} best_km = None for k in k_range : try : km = KMeans ( n_clusters = k , n_init = 10 , random_state = 42 ) labels = km . fit_predict ( X ) if len ( set ( labels )) < 2 : continue sil = silhouette_score ( X , labels , sample_size = min ( 2000 , X . shape [ 0 ]), random_state = 42 ) sils [ k ] = sil if sil > best_sil : best_sil = sil best_k = k best_km = km except Exception as e : log . warning ( f "KMeans k= { k } failed: { e } " ) if best_km is None : # Fallback: K=3 best_km = KMeans ( n_clusters = 3 , n_init = 10 , random_state = 42 ) . fit ( X ) best_k = 3 best_sil = 0.0 sils = { 3 : 0.0 } return best_k , best_sil , sils , best_km # ============================================================ # RECIPE: analyze # ============================================================ def recipe_analyze ( filepaths : List [ str | Path ], * , keyword : Optional [ str ] = None , chapter_pattern : Optional [ str ] = None , lang : str = "auto" , top_n : int = 15 , out_dir : Path = None , ) -> Dict [ str , Any ]: """ Глубокий анализ одного файла: POLER + sklearn. Что делает: 1. Читает файл 2. Разбивает на главы (core.split_chapters) 3. POLER: analyze_large_file по keyword + cluster_fragments 4. POLER: grep по keyword (карта позиций) 5. sklearn: TF-IDF абзацев + KMeans + PCA + cosine соседей 6. Shannon entropy по главам 7. Генерирует 5 PNG + JSON + Markdown verdict """ if len ( filepaths ) != 1 : raise ConfigurationError ( "analyze expects exactly 1 file" , hint = "Use 'compare' for 2 files." , ) filepath = Path ( filepaths [ 0 ]) log . info ( f "[analyze] file= { filepath } , keyword= { keyword } " ) # 1. Чтение text , fmt = core . read_any ( filepath ) log . info ( f "  read: { len ( text ) } chars, format= { fmt } " ) # 2. Главы chapters = core . split_chapters ( text , pattern = chapter_pattern , lang = lang ) log . info ( f "  chapters: { len ( chapters ) } " ) # 3. keyword kw = core . pick_keyword ( text , hint = keyword ) log . info ( f "  keyword: { kw } " ) # 4. POLER analyze_large_file poler_big = core . safe_call ( "analyze_large_file" , str ( filepath ), keyword = kw , window_size = 3000 , chunk_size = 100000 , top_n = top_n , progress = False , phi_decay = 0.85 , kappa = 1.0 , ) fragments = poler_big . get ( "top_fragments" , []) clusters = [] cluster_sizes = [] if fragments : try : clusters = core . safe_call ( "cluster_fragments" , fragments , adaptive = True ) cluster_sizes = [ len ( c ) for c in clusters ] except Exception as e : log . warning ( f "cluster_fragments failed: { e } " ) log . info ( f "  POLER: { poler_big . get ( 'total_occurrences' , 0 ) } occ, " f " { len ( fragments ) } frag, { len ( clusters ) } clusters" ) # 5. POLER grep по keyword grep_results = core . safe_call ( "grep_search_file" , str ( filepath ), kw , ignore_case = True , count_only = False , ) char_positions = [ r . line_number for r in grep_results ] # 6. sklearn features all_paragraphs = [] para_chapter_idx = [] for ci , ch in enumerate ( chapters ): for p in ch [ "paragraphs" ]: if len ( p . split ()) >= 4 : all_paragraphs . append ( p ) para_chapter_idx . append ( ci ) if len ( all_paragraphs ) < 4 : raise RecipeError ( f "only { len ( all_paragraphs ) } paragraphs after filtering" , hint = "Возможно, EPUB без переносов строк — попробуйте --lang inline_ru" , ) X , _ = _sklearn_features ( all_paragraphs ) log . info ( f "  sklearn X: { X . shape } " ) # 7. Cosine соседей sims = np . array ([ cosine_similarity ( X . getrow ( i - 1 ), X . getrow ( i ))[ 0 , 0 ] for i in range ( 1 , X . shape [ 0 ]) ]) # 8. KMeans + silhouette best_k , best_sil , sils , km = _best_kmeans ( X , range ( 3 , 13 )) cluster_labels = km . labels_ # 9. PCA pca = PCA ( n_components = 2 , random_state = 42 ) coords = pca . fit_transform ( X . toarray ()) # 10. Chapter matrix chap_centroids = np . zeros (( len ( chapters ), X . shape [ 1 ])) for ci in range ( len ( chapters )): idxs = [ i for i , c in enumerate ( para_chapter_idx ) if c == ci ] if idxs : v = X [ idxs ] . mean ( axis = 0 ) . A1 n = np . linalg . norm ( v ) if n > 0 : v = v / n chap_centroids [ ci ] = v chap_sim = cosine_similarity ( chap_centroids ) chap_sim_mean = float (( chap_sim . sum () - np . trace ( chap_sim )) / ( chap_sim . size - len ( chap_sim ))) # 11. Энтропия entropies = np . array ([ _shannon_entropy ( ch [ "body" ]) for ch in chapters ]) # 12. EMOTIONAL_MARKERS markers = sorted ( core . get_poler () . EMOTIONAL_MARKERS ) ch_marker_matrix = np . zeros (( len ( chapters ), len ( markers ))) for ci , ch in enumerate ( chapters ): body = ch [ "body" ] . lower () tokens = re . findall ( r "[\w’']+" , body ) tc = Counter ( tokens ) for mi , m in enumerate ( markers ): ch_marker_matrix [ ci , mi ] = tc . get ( m . lower (), 0 ) chap_sim_poler = None if ch_marker_matrix . sum () > 0 : norm = ch_marker_matrix / ( ch_marker_matrix . sum ( axis = 1 , keepdims = True ) + 1e-9 ) l2 = np . linalg . norm ( norm , axis = 1 , keepdims = True ) l2 [ l2 == 0 ] = 1 norm = norm / l2 chap_sim_poler = norm @ norm . T # 13. Вердикт verdict = report . coherence_verdict ( float ( sims . mean ()), float ( best_sil )) # 14. Графики artifacts = {} if out_dir is not None : artifacts [ "chapter_matrix_sklearn" ] = out_dir / "01_chapter_matrix_sklearn.png" viz . chapter_matrix ( chap_sim , [ c [ "title" ] for c in chapters ], artifacts [ "chapter_matrix_sklearn" ], title = f " { filepath . stem } — главы (sklearn TF-IDF)" , cmap = "viridis" , ) if chap_sim_poler is not None : artifacts [ "chapter_matrix_poler" ] = out_dir / "02_chapter_matrix_poler.png" viz . chapter_matrix ( chap_sim_poler , [ c [ "title" ] for c in chapters ], artifacts [ "chapter_matrix_poler" ], title = f " { filepath . stem } — главы (POLER markers)" , cmap = "magma" , ) artifacts [ "transition" ] = out_dir / "03_transition_smoothness.png" viz . transition_smoothness ( sims , artifacts [ "transition" ], title = f " { filepath . stem } — переходы абзацев" , ) artifacts [ "pca" ] = out_dir / "04_pca_scatter.png" viz . pca_scatter ( coords , cluster_labels , chapter_idx = para_chapter_idx , explained_variance = tuple ( pca . explained_variance_ratio_ ), out_path = artifacts [ "pca" ], title = f " { filepath . stem } — PCA (silhouette= { best_sil : .3f } )" , ) artifacts [ "entropy" ] = out_dir / "05_entropy.png" viz . entropy_per_chapter ( entropies , [ c [ "title" ] for c in chapters ], artifacts [ "entropy" ], title = f " { filepath . stem } — Shannon entropy" , ) if cluster_sizes : artifacts [ "clusters" ] = out_dir / "06_cluster_sizes.png" viz . cluster_sizes_bar ( cluster_sizes , artifacts [ "clusters" ], title = f " { filepath . stem } — POLER clusters (keyword=' { kw } ')" , ) artifacts [ "character_map" ] = out_dir / "07_character_map.png" viz . character_map ( [ kw ], { kw : char_positions }, { kw : len ( char_positions )}, artifacts [ "character_map" ], title = f " { filepath . stem } — карта ' { kw } ' ( { len ( char_positions ) } згадок)" , ) # 15. Отчёт metrics = { "total_words" : int ( len ( text . split ())), "total_chapters" : len ( chapters ), "total_paragraphs" : len ( all_paragraphs ), "keyword" : kw , "poler" : { "total_occurrences" : int ( poler_big . get ( "total_occurrences" , 0 )), "unique_fragments" : int ( poler_big . get ( "unique_fragments" , 0 )), "fragments_returned" : len ( fragments ), "n_clusters" : len ( clusters ), "cluster_sizes" : cluster_sizes [: 15 ], }, "sklearn" : { "neighbor_cosine_mean" : float ( sims . mean ()), "neighbor_cosine_std" : float ( sims . std ()), "frac_below_0.05" : float (( sims < 0.05 ) . mean ()), "frac_below_0.10" : float (( sims < 0.10 ) . mean ()), "frac_above_0.20" : float (( sims > 0.20 ) . mean ()), "best_k" : int ( best_k ), "silhouette" : float ( best_sil ), "silhouettes_all" : { int ( k ): float ( v ) for k , v in sils . items ()}, "pca_explained_variance" : float ( pca . explained_variance_ratio_ . sum ()), "chap_sim_mean_offdiag" : chap_sim_mean , "X_shape" : list ( X . shape ), }, "shannon_entropy" : { "mean" : float ( entropies . mean ()), "std" : float ( entropies . std ()), "min" : float ( entropies . min ()), "max" : float ( entropies . max ()), }, "emotional_markers_found" : int (( ch_marker_matrix . sum ( axis = 0 ) > 0 ) . sum ()), "emotional_markers_total" : int ( len ( markers )), } verdict_lines = report . verdict_block ( f "Анализ: { filepath . name } " , report . metric_table ( [ "Метрика" , "Значение" ], [ [ "Файл" , str ( filepath )], [ "Слов" , str ( metrics [ "total_words" ])], [ "Глав" , str ( metrics [ "total_chapters" ])], [ "Абзацев" , str ( metrics [ "total_paragraphs" ])], [ "Keyword (auto)" , kw ], [ "POLER occurrences" , str ( metrics [ "poler" ][ "total_occurrences" ])], [ "POLER fragments" , str ( metrics [ "poler" ][ "fragments_returned" ])], [ "POLER clusters" , str ( metrics [ "poler" ][ "n_clusters" ])], [ "sklearn neighbor cosine" , f " { metrics [ 'sklearn' ][ 'neighbor_cosine_mean' ] : .3f } " ], [ "sklearn frac<0.10" , f " { metrics [ 'sklearn' ][ 'frac_below_0.10' ] : .1% } " ], [ "sklearn silhouette" , f " { metrics [ 'sklearn' ][ 'silhouette' ] : .3f } " ], [ "sklearn PCA expl.var" , f " { metrics [ 'sklearn' ][ 'pca_explained_variance' ] : .3f } " ], [ "sklearn chap cosine" , f " { metrics [ 'sklearn' ][ 'chap_sim_mean_offdiag' ] : .3f } " ], [ "Entropy mean" , f " { metrics [ 'shannon_entropy' ][ 'mean' ] : .2f } bits/token" ], [ "EMOTIONAL_MARKERS" , f " { metrics [ 'emotional_markers_found' ] } / { metrics [ 'emotional_markers_total' ] } " ], ], ), [ f "## Вердикт" , "" , f "** { verdict } **" , "" ], ) full_report = report . wrap_report ( task_name = "analyze" , engine = "POLER v6 + sklearn" , input_files = [ str ( filepath )], metrics = metrics , output_files = { k : str ( v ) for k , v in artifacts . items ()}, verdict = verdict , ) return { "report" : full_report , "verdict_lines" : verdict_lines , "artifacts" : artifacts , } # ============================================================ # RECIPE: compare # ============================================================ def recipe_compare ( filepaths : List [ str | Path ], * , keyword : Optional [ str ] = None , chapter_pattern : Optional [ str ] = None , lang : str = "auto" , out_dir : Path = None , ) -> Dict [ str , Any ]: """Сравнение двух файлов по всем метрикам.""" if len ( filepaths ) != 2 : raise ConfigurationError ( "compare expects exactly 2 files" , hint = "Use 'analyze' for 1 file." , ) fp_a , fp_b = Path ( filepaths [ 0 ]), Path ( filepaths [ 1 ]) log . info ( f "[compare] { fp_a . name } vs { fp_b . name } " ) # Анализ каждого файла (без генерации артефактов) res_a = recipe_analyze ([ fp_a ], keyword = keyword , chapter_pattern = chapter_pattern , lang = lang , out_dir = None ) res_b = recipe_analyze ([ fp_b ], keyword = keyword , chapter_pattern = chapter_pattern , lang = lang , out_dir = None ) m_a = res_a [ "report" ][ "metrics" ] m_b = res_b [ "report" ][ "metrics" ] # Метрики сравнения coh_a = m_a [ "sklearn" ][ "neighbor_cosine_mean" ] coh_b = m_b [ "sklearn" ][ "neighbor_cosine_mean" ] sil_a = m_a [ "sklearn" ][ "silhouette" ] sil_b = m_b [ "sklearn" ][ "silhouette" ] chap_a = m_a [ "sklearn" ][ "chap_sim_mean_offdiag" ] chap_b = m_b [ "sklearn" ][ "chap_sim_mean_offdiag" ] pca_a = m_a [ "sklearn" ][ "pca_explained_variance" ] pca_b = m_b [ "sklearn" ][ "pca_explained_variance" ] frac_a = m_a [ "sklearn" ][ "frac_below_0.10" ] frac_b = m_b [ "sklearn" ][ "frac_below_0.10" ] ratios = { "coherence_ratio" : coh_b / max ( coh_a , 1e-6 ), "silhouette_ratio" : sil_b / max ( sil_a , 1e-6 ), "chap_sim_ratio" : chap_b / max ( chap_a , 1e-6 ), "pca_variance_ratio" : pca_b / max ( pca_a , 1e-6 ), "frac_sharp_ratio" : frac_a / max ( frac_b , 1e-6 ), # во сколько раз меньше скачков } # Вердикт verdict = ( f " { fp_b . stem } vs { fp_a . stem } : " f "связность соседних абзацев в { ratios [ 'coherence_ratio' ] : .1f } × " f "( { coh_b : .3f } vs { coh_a : .3f } ); " f "silhouette в { ratios [ 'silhouette_ratio' ] : .1f } × " f "( { sil_b : .3f } vs { sil_a : .3f } ); " f "PCA expl.var в { ratios [ 'pca_variance_ratio' ] : .1f } × " f "( { pca_b : .3f } vs { pca_a : .3f } ); " f "резких скачков в { ratios [ 'frac_sharp_ratio' ] : .1f } × меньше." ) # Графики artifacts = {} if out_dir is not None : # Dashboard sklearn artifacts [ "sklearn_dashboard" ] = out_dir / "01_sklearn_dashboard.png" viz . comparison_dashboard ( metric_names = [ "Сосед. cosine" , "Silhouette" , "PCA expl.var" , "Доля <0.10" , "Доля >0.20" , "Cosine глав" , ], values_a = [ coh_a , sil_a , pca_a , frac_a , m_a [ "sklearn" ][ "frac_above_0.20" ], chap_a ], values_b = [ coh_b , sil_b , pca_b , frac_b , m_b [ "sklearn" ][ "frac_above_0.20" ], chap_b ], label_a = fp_a . stem [: 15 ], label_b = fp_b . stem [: 15 ], out_path = artifacts [ "sklearn_dashboard" ], title = "sklearn метрики" , ) # Dashboard POLER cl_a = m_a [ "poler" ][ "n_clusters" ] cl_b = m_b [ "poler" ][ "n_clusters" ] frag_a = m_a [ "poler" ][ "fragments_returned" ] frag_b = m_b [ "poler" ][ "fragments_returned" ] occ_a = m_a [ "poler" ][ "total_occurrences" ] occ_b = m_b [ "poler" ][ "total_occurrences" ] ent_a = m_a [ "shannon_entropy" ][ "mean" ] ent_b = m_b [ "shannon_entropy" ][ "mean" ] idx_a = m_a [ "total_words" ] idx_b = m_b [ "total_words" ] artifacts [ "poler_dashboard" ] = out_dir / "02_poler_dashboard.png" viz . comparison_dashboard ( metric_names = [ "Слов" , "POLER occurrences" , "Фрагментов" , "Кластеров" , "Entropy mean" , "Глав" , ], values_a = [ idx_a , occ_a , frag_a , cl_a , ent_a , m_a [ "total_chapters" ]], values_b = [ idx_b , occ_b , frag_b , cl_b , ent_b , m_b [ "total_chapters" ]], label_a = fp_a . stem [: 15 ], label_b = fp_b . stem [: 15 ], out_path = artifacts [ "poler_dashboard" ], title = "POLER v6 метрики" , color_a = "#8e44ad" , color_b = "#16a085" , ) verdict_lines = report . verdict_block ( f "Сравнение: { fp_a . name } vs { fp_b . name } " , report . metric_table ( [ "Метрика" , fp_a . stem [: 20 ], fp_b . stem [: 20 ], "Ratio" ], [ [ "Сосед. cosine" , f " { coh_a : .3f } " , f " { coh_b : .3f } " , f " { ratios [ 'coherence_ratio' ] : .2f } ×" ], [ "Silhouette" , f " { sil_a : .3f } " , f " { sil_b : .3f } " , f " { ratios [ 'silhouette_ratio' ] : .2f } ×" ], [ "Cosine глав" , f " { chap_a : .3f } " , f " { chap_b : .3f } " , f " { ratios [ 'chap_sim_ratio' ] : .2f } ×" ], [ "PCA expl.var" , f " { pca_a : .3f } " , f " { pca_b : .3f } " , f " { ratios [ 'pca_variance_ratio' ] : .2f } ×" ], [ "Доля скачков <0.10" , f " { frac_a : .1% } " , f " { frac_b : .1% } " , f " { ratios [ 'frac_sharp_ratio' ] : .2f } ×" ], [ "Слов" , str ( m_a [ "total_words" ]), str ( m_b [ "total_words" ]), "" ], [ "Глав" , str ( m_a [ "total_chapters" ]), str ( m_b [ "total_chapters" ]), "" ], [ "POLER clusters" , str ( cl_a ), str ( cl_b ), "" ], [ "Entropy mean" , f " { ent_a : .2f } " , f " { ent_b : .2f } " , "" ], ], ), [ "## Вердикт" , "" , f "** { verdict } **" , "" ], ) full_report = report . wrap_report ( task_name = "compare" , engine = "POLER v6 + sklearn" , input_files = [ str ( fp_a ), str ( fp_b )], metrics = { fp_a . stem : m_a , fp_b . stem : m_b , "ratios" : ratios , }, output_files = { k : str ( v ) for k , v in artifacts . items ()}, verdict = verdict , ) return { "report" : full_report , "verdict_lines" : verdict_lines , "artifacts" : artifacts , } # ============================================================ # RECIPE: structure # ============================================================ def recipe_structure ( filepaths : List [ str | Path ], * , chapter_pattern : Optional [ str ] = None , lang : str = "auto" , out_dir : Path = None , ) -> Dict [ str , Any ]: """ Только структурный анализ (без keyword, без POLER engine). Главы + TF-IDF + KMeans + PCA + entropy + chapter matrix. Быстрее analyze. """ if len ( filepaths ) != 1 : raise ConfigurationError ( "structure expects exactly 1 file" ) filepath = Path ( filepaths [ 0 ]) log . info ( f "[structure] file= { filepath } " ) text , fmt = core . read_any ( filepath ) chapters = core . split_chapters ( text , pattern = chapter_pattern , lang = lang ) log . info ( f "  chapters: { len ( chapters ) } " ) all_paragraphs = [] para_chapter_idx = [] for ci , ch in enumerate ( chapters ): for p in ch [ "paragraphs" ]: if len ( p . split ()) >= 4 : all_paragraphs . append ( p ) para_chapter_idx . append ( ci ) if len ( all_paragraphs ) < 4 : raise RecipeError ( f "only { len ( all_paragraphs ) } paragraphs" ) X , _ = _sklearn_features ( all_paragraphs ) sims = np . array ([ cosine_similarity ( X . getrow ( i - 1 ), X . getrow ( i ))[ 0 , 0 ] for i in range ( 1 , X . shape [ 0 ]) ]) best_k , best_sil , sils , km = _best_kmeans ( X , range ( 3 , 13 )) pca = PCA ( n_components = 2 , random_state = 42 ) coords = pca . fit_transform ( X . toarray ()) chap_centroids = np . zeros (( len ( chapters ), X . shape [ 1 ])) for ci in range ( len ( chapters )): idxs = [ i for i , c in enumerate ( para_chapter_idx ) if c == ci ] if idxs : v = X [ idxs ] . mean ( axis = 0 ) . A1 n = np . linalg . norm ( v ) if n > 0 : v = v / n chap_centroids [ ci ] = v chap_sim = cosine_similarity ( chap_centroids ) chap_sim_mean = float (( chap_sim . sum () - np . trace ( chap_sim )) / ( chap_sim . size - len ( chap_sim ))) entropies = np . array ([ _shannon_entropy ( ch [ "body" ]) for ch in chapters ]) verdict = report . coherence_verdict ( float ( sims . mean ()), float ( best_sil )) artifacts = {} if out_dir is not None : artifacts [ "chapter_matrix" ] = out_dir / "01_chapter_matrix.png" viz . chapter_matrix ( chap_sim , [ c [ "title" ] for c in chapters ], artifacts [ "chapter_matrix" ], title = f " { filepath . stem } — главы (TF-IDF)" , ) artifacts [ "transition" ] = out_dir / "02_transition.png" viz . transition_smoothness ( sims , artifacts [ "transition" ], title = f " { filepath . stem } — переходы" , ) artifacts [ "pca" ] = out_dir / "03_pca.png" viz . pca_scatter ( coords = coords , cluster_labels = km . labels_ , chapter_idx = para_chapter_idx , explained_variance = tuple ( pca . explained_variance_ratio_ ), out_path = artifacts [ "pca" ], title = f " { filepath . stem } — PCA (silhouette= { best_sil : .3f } )" , ) artifacts [ "entropy" ] = out_dir / "04_entropy.png" viz . entropy_per_chapter ( entropies , [ c [ "title" ] for c in chapters ], artifacts [ "entropy" ], title = f " { filepath . stem } — entropy" , ) metrics = { "total_words" : int ( len ( text . split ())), "total_chapters" : len ( chapters ), "total_paragraphs" : len ( all_paragraphs ), "neighbor_cosine_mean" : float ( sims . mean ()), "neighbor_cosine_std" : float ( sims . std ()), "frac_below_0.10" : float (( sims < 0.10 ) . mean ()), "frac_above_0.20" : float (( sims > 0.20 ) . mean ()), "best_k" : int ( best_k ), "silhouette" : float ( best_sil ), "pca_explained_variance" : float ( pca . explained_variance_ratio_ . sum ()), "chap_sim_mean_offdiag" : chap_sim_mean , "entropy_mean" : float ( entropies . mean ()), "entropy_std" : float ( entropies . std ()), } verdict_lines = report . verdict_block ( f "Структура: { filepath . name } " , report . metric_table ( [ "Метрика" , "Значение" ], [ [ "Слов" , str ( metrics [ "total_words" ])], [ "Глав" , str ( metrics [ "total_chapters" ])], [ "Абзацев" , str ( metrics [ "total_paragraphs" ])], [ "Сосед. cosine" , f " { metrics [ 'neighbor_cosine_mean' ] : .3f } " ], [ "Доля <0.10" , f " { metrics [ 'frac_below_0.10' ] : .1% } " ], [ "Доля >0.20" , f " { metrics [ 'frac_above_0.20' ] : .1% } " ], [ "Silhouette" , f " { metrics [ 'silhouette' ] : .3f } " ], [ "PCA expl.var" , f " { metrics [ 'pca_explained_variance' ] : .3f } " ], [ "Cosine глав" , f " { metrics [ 'chap_sim_mean_offdiag' ] : .3f } " ], [ "Entropy" , f " { metrics [ 'entropy_mean' ] : .2f } " ], ], ), [ "## Вердикт" , "" , f "** { verdict } **" , "" ], ) full_report = report . wrap_report ( task_name = "structure" , engine = "sklearn (TF-IDF + KMeans + PCA)" , input_files = [ str ( filepath )], metrics = metrics , output_files = { k : str ( v ) for k , v in artifacts . items ()}, verdict = verdict , ) return { "report" : full_report , "verdict_lines" : verdict_lines , "artifacts" : artifacts , } # ============================================================ # RECIPE: characters # ============================================================ def recipe_characters ( filepaths : List [ str | Path ], * , names : Optional [ List [ str ]] = None , out_dir : Path = None , ) -> Dict [ str , Any ]: """ Карта персонажей по тексту. Использует POLER's grep_search_file для каждого имени. Авто-detect: если names не заданы — берёт топ-N знаменательных существительных. """ if len ( filepaths ) != 1 : raise ConfigurationError ( "characters expects exactly 1 file" ) filepath = Path ( filepaths [ 0 ]) log . info ( f "[characters] file= { filepath } , names= { names } " ) text , fmt = core . read_any ( filepath ) # Авто-detect имён, если не заданы if not names : # Берём топ-10 знаменательных слов, фильтруем по заглавной букве tokens = re . findall ( r "\b[A-ZА-ЯІЄЇ][\w’']+\b" , text ) counter = Counter ( tokens ) # Уберём начала предложений (грубая эвристика) # Берём те, что встречаются > 5 раз и не в начале абзаца candidates = [( w , c ) for w , c in counter . most_common ( 50 ) if c >= 5 ] # Отфильтровать стоп-слова stop = { "The" , "And" , "But" , "This" , "That" , "These" , "Those" , "It" , "He" , "She" , "They" , "We" , "You" , "I" , "Але" , "Тоді" , "Це" , "Той" , "Та" , "Цей" , "Ця" , "Він" , "Вона" , "Вони" , "Ми" , "Ви" , "Я" } candidates = [( w , c ) for w , c in candidates if w not in stop ] names = [ w for w , _ in candidates [: 10 ]] log . info ( f "  auto-detected names: { names } " ) # grep по каждому имени positions = {} counts = {} for name in names : res = core . safe_call ( "grep_search_file" , str ( filepath ), name , ignore_case = False , count_only = False , ) positions [ name ] = [ r . line_number for r in res ] counts [ name ] = len ( res ) log . info ( f " { name } : { counts [ name ] } " ) # Сортировать по убыванию частоты sorted_pairs = sorted ( counts . items (), key = lambda x : - x [ 1 ]) sorted_names = [ n for n , _ in sorted_pairs ] # Совместная встречаемость (co-occurrence в окне 1000 chars) cooc = np . zeros (( len ( names ), len ( names )), dtype = int ) name_idx = { n : i for i , n in enumerate ( names )} for i , n1 in enumerate ( names ): for pos1 in positions [ n1 ]: # Окно ±1000 chars вокруг pos1 # (используем line_number как прокси для позиции) for j , n2 in enumerate ( names ): if i == j : continue for pos2 in positions [ n2 ]: if abs ( pos2 - pos1 ) <= 50 : # 50 строк cooc [ i , j ] += 1 break # Графики artifacts = {} if out_dir is not None : artifacts [ "character_map" ] = out_dir / "01_character_map.png" viz . character_map ( sorted_names , positions , counts , artifacts [ "character_map" ], title = f " { filepath . stem } — карта персонажей" , ) # Co-occurrence matrix artifacts [ "cooc_matrix" ] = out_dir / "02_cooccurrence.png" viz . cooccurrence_matrix ( cooc , sorted_names , artifacts [ "cooc_matrix" ], title = f " { filepath . stem } — совместная встречаемость (окно 50 строк)" , ) # Главный персонаж if sorted_names : protagonist = sorted_names [ 0 ] verdict = ( f "Главный персонаж: ' { protagonist } ' ( { counts [ protagonist ] } згадок). " f "Всего отслеживается { len ( sorted_names ) } персонажей. " f "Сумма згадок: { sum ( counts . values ()) } ." ) else : protagonist = None verdict = "Персонажи не найдены." metrics = { "total_words" : int ( len ( text . split ())), "characters_tracked" : len ( sorted_names ), "character_counts" : { n : counts [ n ] for n in sorted_names }, "protagonist" : protagonist , "cooccurrence_matrix" : cooc . tolist (), "cooccurrence_names" : sorted_names , } verdict_lines = report . verdict_block ( f "Карта персонажей: { filepath . name } " , report . metric_table ( [ "Персонаж" , "Згадок" ], [[ n , str ( counts [ n ])] for n in sorted_names ], ), [ "## Вердикт" , "" , f "** { verdict } **" , "" ], ) full_report = report . wrap_report ( task_name = "characters" , engine = "POLER v6 (grep_search_file)" , input_files = [ str ( filepath )], metrics = metrics , output_files = { k : str ( v ) for k , v in artifacts . items ()}, verdict = verdict , ) return { "report" : full_report , "verdict_lines" : verdict_lines , "artifacts" : artifacts , } # ============================================================ # Реестр рецептов # ============================================================ RECIPES = { "analyze" : { "fn" : recipe_analyze , "n_files" : 1 , "description" : "Глубокий анализ одного файла (POLER + sklearn)" , "options" : [ "keyword" , "chapter_pattern" , "lang" , "top_n" ], }, "compare" : { "fn" : recipe_compare , "n_files" : 2 , "description" : "Сравнение двух файлов по метрикам" , "options" : [ "keyword" , "chapter_pattern" , "lang" ], }, "structure" : { "fn" : recipe_structure , "n_files" : 1 , "description" : "Только структурный анализ (быстро, без POLER engine)" , "options" : [ "chapter_pattern" , "lang" ], }, "characters" : { "fn" : recipe_characters , "n_files" : 1 , "description" : "Карта персонажей (POLER grep)" , "options" : [ "names" ], }, # ---- Stage 2 extension recipes (Agents A-E) ---- "theme_evolution" : { "fn" : recipe_theme_evolution , "n_files" : 1 , "description" : "Evolution of EMOTIONAL_MARKERS across chapters" , "options" : [ "chapter_pattern" , "lang" , "top_n" ], }, "themes_alpha" : { "fn" : recipe_themes_alpha , "n_files" : 1 , "description" : "Alphabetical inverted word index with source tracking + size optimization" , "options" : [ "chapter_pattern" , "lang" , "max_locations" , "top_n" ], }, "diff_versions" : { "fn" : recipe_diff_versions , "n_files" : 2 , "description" : "Compare two versions of a text: POLER diff_files + chapter-level TF-IDF cosine + difflib token delta with 4 PNG visualizations" , "options" : [ "keyword" , "chapter_pattern" , "lang" , "window_size" ], }, "batch_directory" : { "fn" : recipe_batch_directory , "n_files" : 1 , "description" : "Analyze every file in a directory: per-file metrics + TF-IDF cosine similarity + PCA + outlier detection + POLER analyze_directory; 5 PNG + 4 text artifacts" , "options" : [ "keyword" , "extensions" , "recursive" , "top_n" ], }, "custom_plugin" : { "fn" : recipe_custom_plugin , "n_files" : None , "description" : "Load and run an external Python plugin file; wraps plugin output in standard toolkit report format. Sandbox-lite: timeout + error capture + os.environ / subprocess / socket warning hooks; auto-generated plugin_info.md." , "options" : [ "plugin_path" , "timeout" , "plugin_opts" ], }, "smart_read" : { "fn" : recipe_smart_read , "n_files" : 1 , "description" : "Token-efficient file read: summary / context / full / streaming modes. Returns stats, never full content." , "options" : [ "mode" , "query" , "max_chars" , "top_n" , "context_chars" ], }, "smart_search" : { "fn" : recipe_smart_search , "n_files" : None , "description" : "Unified search: regex + full-text + file discovery. Ranked compact results." , "options" : [ "pattern" , "keyword" , "include" , "exclude" , "max_results" , "context_lines" , "ignore_case" , "recursive" ], }, "smart_batch" : { "fn" : recipe_smart_batch , "n_files" : 1 , "description" : "Batch process N files: compact per-file stats, no full content." , "options" : [ "keyword" , "extensions" , "recursive" , "top_n" ], }, "smart_cache" : { "fn" : recipe_smart_cache , "n_files" : None , "description" : "Persistent analysis cache: store / get / list / clear." , "options" : [ "action" , "cache_dir" , "keyword" ], }, "smart_diff" : { "fn" : recipe_smart_diff , "n_files" : None , "description" : "Fast differential: compare two files or file vs cached version." , "options" : [ "keyword" , "cache_dir" ], }, } __all__ = [ "recipe_analyze" , "recipe_compare" , "recipe_structure" , "recipe_characters" , "recipe_theme_evolution" , "recipe_themes_alpha" , "recipe_diff_versions" , "recipe_batch_directory" , "recipe_custom_plugin" , "recipe_smart_read" , "recipe_smart_search" , "recipe_smart_batch" , "recipe_smart_cache" , "recipe_smart_diff" , "RECIPES" , ]
report.py
Файл: poler_toolkit/report.py · Размер: 5 023 байт
""" poler_toolkit.report — генерация отчётов. Два выходных формата: - JSON (машинно-читаемый, для downstream обработки) - Markdown verdict (человекочитаемый, краткая сводка) Все отчёты пишутся в одну выходную директорию с timestamp. """ from __future__ import annotations import json import logging from pathlib import Path from datetime import datetime from typing import Any , Dict , Optional , List from .errors import OutputError log = logging . getLogger ( "poler_toolkit.report" ) # ============================================================ # JSON-отчёт # ============================================================ def save_json_report ( data : Dict [ str , Any ], out_dir : Path , filename : str = "report.json" , ) -> Path : """ Сохраняет data как JSON в out_dir/filename. Бросает OutputError при падении. """ out_path = out_dir / filename try : out_path . write_text ( json . dumps ( data , ensure_ascii = False , indent = 2 , default = str ), encoding = "utf-8" , ) log . info ( f "JSON report saved: { out_path } " ) return out_path except Exception as e : raise OutputError ( f "Cannot write { out_path } : { e } " ) # ============================================================ # Markdown verdict # ============================================================ def save_markdown_verdict ( lines : List [ str ], out_dir : Path , filename : str = "verdict.md" , ) -> Path : """Сохраняет verdict как Markdown.""" out_path = out_dir / filename try : out_path . write_text ( " \n " . join ( lines ), encoding = "utf-8" ) log . info ( f "Markdown verdict saved: { out_path } " ) return out_path except Exception as e : raise OutputError ( f "Cannot write { out_path } : { e } " ) # ============================================================ # Стандартная обёртка для всех отчётов # ============================================================ def wrap_report ( task_name : str , engine : str , input_files : List [ str ], metrics : Dict [ str , Any ], output_files : Dict [ str , str ], verdict : str , extra : Optional [ Dict [ str , Any ]] = None , ) -> Dict [ str , Any ]: """ Стандартный шаблон отчёта. Все recipe-функции возвращают dict этой структуры. """ report = { "meta" : { "task" : task_name , "engine" : engine , "timestamp" : datetime . now () . isoformat ( timespec = "seconds" ), "toolkit_version" : "1.0.0" , }, "inputs" : input_files , "metrics" : metrics , "outputs" : output_files , "verdict" : verdict , } if extra : report [ "extra" ] = extra return report # ============================================================ # Helpers для verdict-ов # ============================================================ def verdict_block ( title : str , * line_groups : List [ str ]) -> List [ str ]: """ Форматирует блок verdict-а. Принимает title + произвольное количество списков строк, склеивает их в один Markdown-блок. """ out = [ f "# { title } " , "" ] for lines in line_groups : out . extend ( lines ) if not lines or lines [ - 1 ] != "" : out . append ( "" ) return out def metric_table ( headers : List [ str ], rows : List [ List [ str ]]) -> List [ str ]: """Markdown-таблица метрик.""" lines = [ "| " + " | " . join ( headers ) + " |" , "|" + "|" . join ([ "---" ] * len ( headers )) + "|" , ] for row in rows : lines . append ( "| " + " | " . join ( row ) + " |" ) lines . append ( "" ) return lines def coherence_verdict ( mean_cosine : float , silhouette : float ) -> str : """Авто-вердикт по coherence + silhouette.""" if mean_cosine < 0.10 and silhouette < 0.05 : return "КЛАСТЕРИ НЕ СКЛАДАЮТЬСЯ — текст розпадається на iзольованi шматки." if mean_cosine < 0.15 and silhouette < 0.15 : return "СЛАБКА СКЛАДАНIСТЬ — кластери формальнi, але зв'язок ламкий." if mean_cosine < 0.25 and silhouette < 0.30 : return "СЕРЕДНЯ СКЛАДАНIСТЬ — структура ║, але з провалами." if mean_cosine >= 0.25 and silhouette >= 0.30 : return "ВИСОКА СКЛАДАНIСТЬ — кластери тримаються, переходи плавнi." return "ЗМIШАНА КАРТИНА — окремi блоки тримаються, iншi розсипаються." __all__ = [ "save_json_report" , "save_markdown_verdict" , "wrap_report" , "verdict_block" , "metric_table" , "coherence_verdict" , ]
runner.py
Файл: poler_toolkit/runner.py · Размер: 8 514 байт
""" poler_toolkit.runner — оркестратор. runner.run(recipe_name, filepaths, opts) -> Path (выходная директория) Шаги: 1. Проверить recipe_name в RECIPES 2. Проверить количество файлов 3. Создать выходную директорию с timestamp 4. Вызвать recipe-функцию с out_dir 5. Сохранить report.json + verdict.md 6. Вернуть путь к выходной директории """ from __future__ import annotations import logging from pathlib import Path from typing import Any , Dict , List , Optional from . import core from . import report from . import recipes from .errors import RecipeError , ConfigurationError log = logging . getLogger ( "poler_toolkit.runner" ) def list_recipes () -> Dict [ str , Dict [ str , Any ]]: """Возвращает словарь доступных рецептов.""" return recipes . RECIPES def run ( recipe_name : str , filepaths : List [ str | Path ], * , keyword : Optional [ str ] = None , chapter_pattern : Optional [ str ] = None , lang : str = "auto" , top_n : int = 15 , names : Optional [ List [ str ]] = None , # ---- Stage 2 ext-recipe options (Agents A-E) ---- plugin_path : Optional [ str ] = None , timeout : int = 300 , plugin_opts : Optional [ Dict [ str , Any ]] = None , extensions : Optional [ List [ str ]] = None , recursive : bool = True , max_locations : int = 20 , window_size : int = 3000 , # ---- end ext-recipe options ---- # ---- smart_toolkit options ---- mode : str = "summary" , query : Optional [ str ] = None , max_chars : int = 2000 , context_chars : int = 500 , pattern : Optional [ str ] = None , include : Optional [ str ] = None , exclude : Optional [ str ] = None , max_results : int = 50 , context_lines : int = 2 , ignore_case : bool = True , action : str = "get" , cache_dir : Optional [ str ] = None , # ---- end smart_toolkit options ---- output_root : Optional [ Path ] = None , task_label : Optional [ str ] = None , ) -> Path : """ Запускает recipe на файлах. Args: recipe_name: 'analyze' / 'compare' / 'structure' / 'characters' / 'theme_evolution' / 'themes_alpha' / 'diff_versions' / 'batch_directory' / 'custom_plugin' filepaths: список файлов (1 для analyze/structure/characters/..., 2 для compare/diff_versions, 1 dir для batch_directory, переменное число для custom_plugin) keyword: keyword для POLER (None = auto-detect) chapter_pattern: regex для глав (None = auto) lang: язык глав ('auto' / 'ru' / 'ua' / 'en' / 'inline_ru' / 'inline_en') top_n: top_n для POLER analyze (default 15) names: список персонажей для recipe='characters' plugin_path: путь к .py файлу плагина для recipe='custom_plugin' timeout: таймаут выполнения плагина в секундах (custom_plugin) plugin_opts: dict опций, передаваемых в плагин (custom_plugin) extensions: список расширений файлов для batch_directory (default: ['.txt', '.md']) recursive: рекурсивный обход каталога для batch_directory max_locations: максимум source locations на слово для themes_alpha window_size: размер окна POLER для diff_versions output_root: корень для выходных файлов (default: env $POLER_TOOLKIT_OUTPUT или ~/.local/share/poler_toolkit/, см. paths.py) task_label: метка задачи (default: recipe_name) Returns: Путь к созданной выходной директории. """ # 1. Проверить recipe if recipe_name not in recipes . RECIPES : available = ", " . join ( recipes . RECIPES . keys ()) raise RecipeError ( f "unknown recipe ' { recipe_name } '" , hint = f "Available: { available } " , ) spec = recipes . RECIPES [ recipe_name ] fn = spec [ "fn" ] expected_n = spec [ "n_files" ] # 2. Проверить файлы (n_files=None → переменное число, пропуск проверки) if expected_n is not None and len ( filepaths ) != expected_n : raise ConfigurationError ( f "recipe ' { recipe_name } ' expects { expected_n } file(s), got { len ( filepaths ) } " , hint = f "Use --help { recipe_name } for usage." , ) if expected_n is None and not filepaths : raise ConfigurationError ( f "recipe ' { recipe_name } ' expects at least 1 file, got 0" , hint = f "Use --help { recipe_name } for usage." , ) # 3. Выходная директория label = task_label or recipe_name out_dir = core . make_output_dir ( label , output_root = output_root ) log . info ( f "Output dir: { out_dir } " ) # 4. Логирование входа log . info ( f "=== RUN recipe=' { recipe_name } ' ===" ) for i , fp in enumerate ( filepaths ): log . info ( f "  input[ { i } ]: { fp } " ) log . info ( f "  opts: keyword= { keyword } , lang= { lang } , top_n= { top_n } , names= { names } " ) # 5. Вызов recipe-функции common_kwargs = { "out_dir" : out_dir } if "keyword" in spec [ "options" ]: common_kwargs [ "keyword" ] = keyword if "chapter_pattern" in spec [ "options" ]: common_kwargs [ "chapter_pattern" ] = chapter_pattern if "lang" in spec [ "options" ]: common_kwargs [ "lang" ] = lang if "top_n" in spec [ "options" ]: common_kwargs [ "top_n" ] = top_n if "names" in spec [ "options" ] and names is not None : common_kwargs [ "names" ] = names # ---- Stage 2 ext-recipe option forwarding ---- if "plugin_path" in spec [ "options" ] and plugin_path is not None : common_kwargs [ "plugin_path" ] = plugin_path if "timeout" in spec [ "options" ]: common_kwargs [ "timeout" ] = timeout if "plugin_opts" in spec [ "options" ] and plugin_opts is not None : common_kwargs [ "plugin_opts" ] = plugin_opts if "extensions" in spec [ "options" ] and extensions is not None : common_kwargs [ "extensions" ] = extensions if "recursive" in spec [ "options" ]: common_kwargs [ "recursive" ] = recursive if "max_locations" in spec [ "options" ]: common_kwargs [ "max_locations" ] = max_locations if "window_size" in spec [ "options" ]: common_kwargs [ "window_size" ] = window_size # ---- smart_toolkit option forwarding ---- if "mode" in spec [ "options" ]: common_kwargs [ "mode" ] = mode if "query" in spec [ "options" ] and query is not None : common_kwargs [ "query" ] = query if "max_chars" in spec [ "options" ]: common_kwargs [ "max_chars" ] = max_chars if "context_chars" in spec [ "options" ]: common_kwargs [ "context_chars" ] = context_chars if "pattern" in spec [ "options" ] and pattern is not None : common_kwargs [ "pattern" ] = pattern if "include" in spec [ "options" ] and include is not None : common_kwargs [ "include" ] = include if "exclude" in spec [ "options" ] and exclude is not None : common_kwargs [ "exclude" ] = exclude if "max_results" in spec [ "options" ]: common_kwargs [ "max_results" ] = max_results if "context_lines" in spec [ "options" ]: common_kwargs [ "context_lines" ] = context_lines if "ignore_case" in spec [ "options" ]: common_kwargs [ "ignore_case" ] = ignore_case if "action" in spec [ "options" ]: common_kwargs [ "action" ] = action if "cache_dir" in spec [ "options" ] and cache_dir is not None : common_kwargs [ "cache_dir" ] = cache_dir bundle = fn ( filepaths , ** common_kwargs ) # 6. Сохранить JSON-отчёт json_path = report . save_json_report ( bundle [ "report" ], out_dir , filename = "report.json" , ) log . info ( f "JSON: { json_path } " ) # 7. Сохранить Markdown verdict md_path = report . save_markdown_verdict ( bundle [ "verdict_lines" ], out_dir , filename = "verdict.md" , ) log . info ( f "Markdown: { md_path } " ) # 8. Финальный лог log . info ( f "=== DONE: { recipe_name } ===" ) log . info ( f "  artifacts: { len ( bundle [ 'artifacts' ]) } PNG files" ) log . info ( f "  verdict: { bundle [ 'report' ][ 'verdict' ][: 120 ] } ..." ) return out_dir __all__ = [ "run" , "list_recipes" ]
viz.py
Файл: poler_toolkit/viz.py · Размер: 15 221 байт
""" poler_toolkit.viz — стандартные графики (matplotlib). Все функции принимают данные + выходной путь, пишут PNG. Единый стиль: шрифты, цвета, DPI. Графики: - chapter_matrix         heatmap глав (cosine similarity) - character_map          карта персонажа по строкам/символам - transition_smoothness  cosine соседних абзацев (smooth vs sharp) - pca_scatter            PCA-проекция абзацев - entropy_per_chapter    Shannon entropy по главам - cluster_sizes          размеры POLER-кластеров - themes_per_chapter     тематические профили (stacked bar) - comparison_dashboard   две книги бок-о-бок (6 метрик) """ from __future__ import annotations import re import logging from pathlib import Path from typing import Optional , List , Dict , Any , Sequence , Tuple import numpy as np import matplotlib matplotlib . use ( "Agg" ) import matplotlib.pyplot as plt import matplotlib.font_manager as fm from .errors import VisualizationError log = logging . getLogger ( "poler_toolkit.viz" ) # ============================================================ # Стиль # ============================================================ def _setup_fonts (): for f in [ "/usr/share/fonts/truetype/chinese/NotoSansSC-Regular.ttf" , "/usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans.ttf" , "/usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans-Bold.ttf" , ]: if Path ( f ) . exists (): try : fm . fontManager . addfont ( f ) except Exception : pass plt . rcParams [ "font.sans-serif" ] = [ "DejaVu Sans" , "Noto Sans SC" ] plt . rcParams [ "axes.unicode_minus" ] = False _setup_fonts () # Палитра COLOR_PRIMARY = "#2c3e50" COLOR_ACCENT = "#e74c3c" COLOR_SECONDARY = "#3498db" COLOR_OK = "#27ae60" COLOR_WARN = "#f39c12" COLOR_BAD = "#c0392b" COLOR_NEUTRAL = "#95a5a6" DPI = 130 # ============================================================ # Утилиты # ============================================================ def _short_label ( title : str ) -> str : """Превращает 'Глава 12 (Робоча назва): Уламок' в '12'.""" m = re . search ( r "\d+" , title ) return m . group ( 0 ) if m else title [: 6 ] def _safe_savefig ( fig , path : Path ): try : fig . savefig ( path , dpi = DPI ) log . info ( f "Saved: { path } " ) except Exception as e : raise VisualizationError ( f "savefig failed: { e } " ) finally : plt . close ( fig ) # ============================================================ # Графики # ============================================================ def chapter_matrix ( sim_matrix : np . ndarray , chapter_titles : List [ str ], out_path : Path , title : str = "Chapter similarity matrix" , cmap : str = "viridis" , ): """Heatmap cosine similarity глав.""" n = len ( chapter_titles ) fig , ax = plt . subplots ( figsize = ( max ( 8 , n * 0.4 ), max ( 7 , n * 0.4 )), constrained_layout = True ) im = ax . imshow ( sim_matrix , cmap = cmap , vmin = 0 , vmax = 1 ) ax . set_title ( title , fontsize = 13 , pad = 10 ) labels = [ _short_label ( t ) for t in chapter_titles ] ax . set_xticks ( range ( n )) ax . set_yticks ( range ( n )) ax . set_xticklabels ( labels , rotation = 90 , fontsize = max ( 5 , 9 - n // 20 )) ax . set_yticklabels ( labels , fontsize = max ( 5 , 9 - n // 20 )) ax . set_xlabel ( "Глава" ) ax . set_ylabel ( "Глава" ) fig . colorbar ( im , ax = ax , fraction = 0.046 , pad = 0.02 , label = "cosine" ) _safe_savefig ( fig , out_path ) def character_map ( characters : List [ str ], positions : Dict [ str , List [ int ]], counts : Dict [ str , int ], out_path : Path , title : str = "Character map" , ): """Карта персонажей по строкам/позициям.""" fig , ax = plt . subplots ( figsize = ( 13 , 6 ), constrained_layout = True ) colors = plt . cm . tab10 ( np . linspace ( 0 , 1 , len ( characters ))) for i , ch in enumerate ( characters ): pos = positions . get ( ch , []) if not pos : continue ax . scatter ( pos , [ i ] * len ( pos ), color = colors [ i ], s = 18 , alpha = 0.65 , edgecolors = "none" ) ax . set_yticks ( range ( len ( characters ))) ax . set_yticklabels ([ f " { ch } ( { counts . get ( ch , 0 ) } )" for ch in characters ], fontsize = 9 ) ax . set_xlabel ( "Позиция в файле (строка)" ) ax . set_title ( title , fontsize = 13 , pad = 10 ) ax . grid ( alpha = 0.25 , axis = "x" ) ax . legend ( [ f " { ch } ( { counts . get ( ch , 0 ) } )" for ch in characters ], loc = "upper right" , fontsize = 7 , ncol = 3 , ) _safe_savefig ( fig , out_path ) def transition_smoothness ( sims : np . ndarray , out_path : Path , window : int = 5 , title : str = "Transition smoothness" , chapter_ticks : Optional [ List [ Tuple [ int , str ]]] = None , ): """Cosine соседних абзацев + згладжування.""" fig , ax = plt . subplots ( figsize = ( 13 , 5 ), constrained_layout = True ) x = np . arange ( len ( sims )) ax . plot ( x , sims , color = COLOR_NEUTRAL , alpha = 0.35 , linewidth = 0.6 , label = "cos(susidнiй абзац)" ) if len ( sims ) >= window : smoothed = np . convolve ( sims , np . ones ( window ) / window , mode = "valid" ) ax . plot ( np . arange ( window - 1 , window - 1 + len ( smoothed )), smoothed , color = COLOR_ACCENT , linewidth = 1.6 , label = f "згладжено (вiкно { window } )" ) ax . axhline ( 0.10 , color = COLOR_OK , linestyle = "--" , alpha = 0.7 , linewidth = 1 , label = "порiг «рвивка» 0.10" ) ax . axhline ( 0.20 , color = COLOR_SECONDARY , linestyle = "--" , alpha = 0.7 , linewidth = 1 , label = "порiг «спорiдненостi» 0.20" ) if chapter_ticks : for pos , lbl in chapter_ticks : ax . axvline ( pos , color = "#bbb" , alpha = 0.2 , linewidth = 0.5 ) ax . set_xlabel ( "Номер абзацу" ) ax . set_ylabel ( "cosine similarity" ) ax . set_title ( title , fontsize = 13 , pad = 10 ) ax . legend ( loc = "upper right" , fontsize = 8 ) ax . grid ( alpha = 0.25 ) _safe_savefig ( fig , out_path ) def pca_scatter ( coords : np . ndarray , cluster_labels : Optional [ np . ndarray ], chapter_idx : Optional [ List [ int ]] = None , chapter_centroids : Optional [ np . ndarray ] = None , explained_variance : Optional [ Tuple [ float , float ]] = None , out_path : Path = None , title : str = "PCA projection" , ): """PCA-проекция абзацев.""" fig , ax = plt . subplots ( figsize = ( 11 , 8 ), constrained_layout = True ) if cluster_labels is not None : scatter = ax . scatter ( coords [:, 0 ], coords [:, 1 ], c = cluster_labels , cmap = "tab10" , s = 10 , alpha = 0.55 , edgecolors = "none" ) elif chapter_idx is not None : scatter = ax . scatter ( coords [:, 0 ], coords [:, 1 ], c = chapter_idx , cmap = "tab20" , s = 10 , alpha = 0.55 , edgecolors = "none" ) else : scatter = ax . scatter ( coords [:, 0 ], coords [:, 1 ], s = 10 , alpha = 0.55 , edgecolors = "none" , color = COLOR_PRIMARY ) if chapter_centroids is not None and chapter_idx is not None : for ci in set ( chapter_idx ): mask = [ i for i , c in enumerate ( chapter_idx ) if c == ci ] if not mask : continue cx = coords [ mask , 0 ] . mean () cy = coords [ mask , 1 ] . mean () ax . scatter ( cx , cy , marker = "x" , c = "black" , s = 60 , linewidths = 1.2 ) ax . text ( cx + 0.01 , cy + 0.01 , str ( ci ), fontsize = 7 , color = "black" , alpha = 0.85 ) if explained_variance : ax . set_xlabel ( f "PC1 ( { explained_variance [ 0 ] : .1% } )" ) ax . set_ylabel ( f "PC2 ( { explained_variance [ 1 ] : .1% } )" ) else : ax . set_xlabel ( "PC1" ) ax . set_ylabel ( "PC2" ) ax . set_title ( title , fontsize = 13 , pad = 10 ) ax . grid ( alpha = 0.25 ) _safe_savefig ( fig , out_path ) def entropy_per_chapter ( entropies : np . ndarray , chapter_titles : List [ str ], out_path : Path , title : str = "Shannon entropy per chapter" , reference_lines : Optional [ Dict [ str , float ]] = None , ): """Энтропия по главам.""" fig , ax = plt . subplots ( figsize = ( 13 , 5 ), constrained_layout = True ) xs = np . arange ( len ( entropies )) ax . bar ( xs , entropies , color = COLOR_PRIMARY , alpha = 0.85 ) m = entropies . mean () s = entropies . std () ax . axhline ( m , color = COLOR_ACCENT , linestyle = "--" , linewidth = 1.5 , label = f "середн║= { m : .2f } " ) if s > 0 : ax . axhline ( m - s , color = COLOR_WARN , linestyle = ":" , linewidth = 1 , label = f "−1σ= { m - s : .2f } " ) ax . axhline ( m + s , color = COLOR_OK , linestyle = ":" , linewidth = 1 , label = f "+1σ= { m + s : .2f } " ) if reference_lines : for lbl , val in reference_lines . items (): ax . axhline ( val , color = COLOR_SECONDARY , linestyle = "-." , linewidth = 1 , alpha = 0.6 , label = lbl ) labels = [ _short_label ( t ) for t in chapter_titles ] ax . set_xticks ( xs ) ax . set_xticklabels ( labels , rotation = 90 , fontsize = 7 ) ax . set_xlabel ( "Глава" ) ax . set_ylabel ( "Entropy (bits/token)" ) ax . set_title ( title , fontsize = 13 , pad = 10 ) ax . legend ( loc = "lower right" , fontsize = 8 ) ax . grid ( alpha = 0.25 , axis = "y" ) _safe_savefig ( fig , out_path ) def cluster_sizes_bar ( cluster_sizes : List [ int ], out_path : Path , title : str = "POLER cluster sizes" , ): """Размеры кластеров POLER.""" if not cluster_sizes : cluster_sizes = [ 0 ] fig , ax = plt . subplots ( figsize = ( 11 , 5 ), constrained_layout = True ) xs = np . arange ( 1 , len ( cluster_sizes ) + 1 ) ax . bar ( xs , cluster_sizes , color = "#8e44ad" , alpha = 0.85 ) if len ( cluster_sizes ) > 0 : m = float ( np . mean ( cluster_sizes )) ax . axhline ( m , color = COLOR_ACCENT , linestyle = "--" , label = f "середнiй= { m : .1f } " ) ax . set_xlabel ( "Номер кластеру" ) ax . set_ylabel ( "Кiлькiсть фрагментiв" ) ax . set_title ( title , fontsize = 13 , pad = 10 ) ax . legend ( fontsize = 9 ) ax . grid ( alpha = 0.25 , axis = "y" ) _safe_savefig ( fig , out_path ) def themes_per_chapter ( ch_marker_matrix : np . самых частых маркеров top_idx = np . argsort ( - ch_marker_matrix . sum ( axis = 0 ))[: top_n ] fig , ax = plt . subplots ( figsize = ( 13 , 6 ), constrained_layout = True ) bottom = np . zeros ( ch_marker_matrix . shape [ 0 ]) colors = plt . cm . viridis ( np . linspace ( 0 , 1 , len ( top_idx ))) # Нормируем на длину главы row_sums = ch_marker_matrix . sum ( axis = 1 , keepdims = True ) + 1 norm = ch_marker_matrix / row_sums for k , mi in enumerate ( top_idx ): ax . bar ( range ( ch_marker_matrix . shape [ 0 ]), norm [:, mi ], bottom = bottom , color = colors [ k ], label = markers [ mi ]) bottom += norm [:, mi ] labels = [ _short_label ( t ) for t in chapter_titles ] ax . set_xticks ( range ( len ( labels ))) ax . set_xticklabels ( labels , rotation = 90 , fontsize = 7 ) ax . set_xlabel ( "Глава" ) ax . set_ylabel ( "Густина маркерiв" ) ax . set_title ( title , fontsize = 13 , pad = 10 ) ax . legend ( loc = "upper right" , fontsize = 7 , ncol = 2 ) ax . grid ( alpha = 0.25 , axis = "y" ) _safe_savefig ( fig , out_path ) def comparison_dashboard ( metric_names : List [ str ], values_a : List [ float ], values_b : List [ float ], label_a : str , label_b : str , out_path : Path , title : str = "Comparison dashboard" , color_a : str = COLOR_BAD , color_b : str = COLOR_OK , ): """Сравнение двух текстов по 6 метрикам.""" n = len ( metric_names ) nrows = ( n + 2 ) // 3 ncols = min ( 3 , n ) fig , axes = plt . subplots ( nrows , ncols , figsize = ( 5 * ncols , 4 * nrows ), constrained_layout = True ) axes = np . atleast_1d ( axes ) . flatten () for i , ( ax , name , va , vb ) in enumerate ( zip ( axes , metric_names , values_a , values_b )): bars = ax . bar ([ label_a , label_b ], [ va , vb ], color = [ color_a , color_b ], alpha = 0.85 , edgecolor = "black" , linewidth = 0.5 ) for b , v in zip ( bars , [ va , vb ]): fmt = f " { v : .3f } " if isinstance ( v , float ) and abs ( v ) < 10 else f " { int ( v ) } " ax . text ( b . get_x () + b . get_width () / 2 , v + 0.005 * max ( va , vb , 1 ), fmt , ha = "center" , va = "bottom" , fontsize = 10 , fontweight = "bold" ) ax . set_title ( name , fontsize = 11 ) ax . grid ( alpha = 0.25 , axis = "y" ) mx = max ( va , vb , 0.01 ) ax . set_ylim ( 0 , mx * 1.25 + 0.01 ) # Скрыть лишние for j in range ( len ( metric_names ), len ( axes )): axes [ j ] . set_visible ( False ) fig . suptitle ( title , fontsize = 14 , fontweight = "bold" ) _safe_savefig ( fig , out_path ) def comparison_matrices ( sim_a : np . ndarray , sim_b : np . ndarray , titles_a : List [ str ], titles_b : List [ str ], label_a : str , label_b : str , out_path : Path , title : str = "Chapter matrices" , cmap : str = "viridis" , ): """Две матрицы глав бок-о-бок.""" fig , axes = plt . subplots ( 1 , 2 , figsize = ( 16 , 7 ), constrained_layout = True ) for ax , sim , label , titles in [ ( axes [ 0 ], sim_a , label_a , titles_a ), ( axes [ 1 ], sim_b , label_b , titles_b ), ]: im = ax . imshow ( sim , cmap = cmap , vmin = 0 , vmax = 1 ) ax . set_title ( label , fontsize = 12 ) labels = [ _short_label ( t ) for t in titles ] ax . set_xticks ( range ( len ( labels ))) ax . set_yticks ( range ( len ( labels ))) ax . set_xticklabels ( labels , rotation = 90 , fontsize = 6 ) ax . set_yticklabels ( labels , fontsize = 6 ) fig . colorbar ( im , ax = ax , fraction = 0.046 , pad = 0.02 ) fig . suptitle ( title , fontsize = 14 , fontweight = "bold" ) _safe_savefig ( fig , out_path ) def cooccurrence_matrix ( cooc : np . ndarray , names : List [ str ], out_path : Path , title : str = "Co-occurrence matrix" , ): """Матрица совместной встречаемости персонажей.""" n = len ( names ) fig , ax = plt . subplots ( figsize = ( 9 , 7 ), constrained_layout = True ) im = ax . imshow ( cooc , cmap = "YlOrRd" ) ax . set_xticks ( range ( n )) ax . set_yticks ( range ( n )) ax . set_xticklabels ( names , rotation = 45 , ha = "right" , fontsize = 9 ) ax . set_yticklabels ( names , fontsize = 9 ) ax . set_title ( title , fontsize = 13 , pad = 10 ) vmax = cooc . max () if cooc . size > 0 else 1 for i in range ( n ): for j in range ( n ): if cooc [ i , j ] > 0 : color = "black" if cooc [ i , j ] < vmax / 2 else "white" ax . text ( j , i , str ( int ( cooc [ i , j ])), ha = "center" , va = "center" , fontsize = 8 , color = color ) fig . colorbar ( im , ax = ax , fraction = 0.046 , pad = 0.02 ) _safe_savefig ( fig , out_path ) __all__ = [ "chapter_matrix" , "character_map" , "transition_smoothness" , "pca_scatter" , "entropy_per_chapter" , "cluster_sizes_bar" , "themes_per_chapter" , "comparison_dashboard" , "comparison_matrices" , "cooccurrence_matrix" , ]
Глава 3. poler_toolkit/docs
Папка: poler_toolkit/docs/
Файлов в папке: 2
AI_USAGE.md
Файл: poler_toolkit/docs/AI_USAGE.md · Размер: 73 994 байт
poler_toolkit — AI Agent Usage Guide
> Audience : AI agents (LLMs) that have been told "use poler_toolkit to analyze this text" and need a scannable, machine-friendly reference to decide which recipe to call, what to pass, and how to interpret the result.
>
> Scope : This document covers the 9 recipes shipped in poler_toolkit (4 core + 5 extension), the Python runner.run() API , the argparse CLI , and the HTTP API server ( poler_toolkit.serve ).
>
> Companion docs :EXAMPLES.mdcontains fully worked examples (input + command + output + interpretation).../README.mdis the human-facing CLI cheat sheet.
TL;DR — Decision Tree
I HAVE …                                          →  CALL THIS RECIPE
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
One text file, want a deep dive on a keyword
(POLER fragments + clusters + sklearn coherence
 + entropy + character map)                       →  analyze        [1 file]
One text file, just structural / coherence check
(no POLER engine, faster — 15–20 s for 100 K words)  →  structure    [1 file]
Two files, want side-by-side metric comparison
(coherence ratio, silhouette ratio, entropy …)    →  compare        [2 files]
Two versions of the same narrative (v1 vs v2),
want added / removed / changed chapter detection
+ POLER semantic delta                            →  diff_versions [2 files]
One file, want character map + co-occurrence
matrix (explicit names OR auto-detect top-10)     →  characters     [1 file]
One file, want to track EMOTIONAL_MARKERS
(60 POLER terms) across chapters
(stacked area + heatmap + top-5 line chart)       →  theme_evolution [1 file]
One file, want full inverted word index
(per-word source locations: chapter / line / char)
+ Zipf / alphabet distribution                    →  themes_alpha    [1 file]
A directory of text files, want overview +
per-file metrics + cross-file similarity +
outlier detection                                 →  batch_directory [1 dir]
Want to run your own Python code on text and
get the toolkit's JSON+MD+PNG wrapper around it   →  custom_plugin   [plugin + N files]
Choosing between analyze and structure :
| You need …                                              | Use      |
|---------------------------------------------------------|----------|
| POLER analyze_large_file keyword fragments + clusters | analyze |
| POLER grep_search_file character position map         | analyze |
| POLER EMOTIONAL_MARKERS chapter×marker matrix         | analyze |
| Everything else (TF-IDF, KMeans, PCA, entropy)          | either   |
| Speed (no POLER engine)                                 | structure |
Choosing between compare and diff_versions :
| You need …                                              | Use            |
|---------------------------------------------------------|----------------|
| Two unrelated files, side-by-side quality dashboard    | compare |
| Two versions of the same novel (track edits)         | diff_versions |
| "How much did chapter 12 change between v1 and v2?"    | diff_versions |
| "Which author is more coherent — A or B?"              | compare |
Quick Start (5 seconds)
Minimal Python snippet that runs structure on a file and reads the JSON report:
import json
from pathlib import Path
from poler_toolkit import runner
# Run a recipe — returns the output directory as a Path.
out_dir = runner.run(
    "structure",
    ["$POLER_TOOLKIT_TEST_FILE"],
    task_label="my_first_run",
)
# Read the machine-readable report.
report = json.loads((out_dir / "report.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
print(out_dir)                       # $POLER_TOOLKIT_OUTPUT/my_first_run_20260629_124155
print(report["verdict"])             # КЛАСТЕРИ НЕ СКЛАДАЮТЬСЯ — текст розпадається на iзольованi шматки.
print(report["metrics"]["silhouette"])  # 0.005655201127629263
print(list(report["outputs"].keys())) # ['chapter_matrix', 'transition', 'pca', 'entropy']
Real run output on the Cassiopeia sample (107 652 words, 35 chapters, 2 835 paragraphs):
verdict   = "КЛАСТЕРИ НЕ СКЛАДАЮТЬСЯ — текст розпадається на iзольованi шматки."
silhouette = 0.0057   ← very low → text doesn't cluster naturally
cosine     = 0.071    ← low → paragraphs are lexically distant from their neighbours
frac<0.10  = 77.4 %   ← most paragraph transitions are sharp
